entries.title: split flag secure and recents preview toggles
entries.description: Recents preview and screenshots can now be enabled separately per app and globally.

entries.title: keep recents thumbnail protected after unlock
entries.description: Recents now stays blurred for all locked apps unless FLAG_SECURE is disabled and the app has been authenticated.

entries.title: wire app overrides and relock delay into system_server
entries.description: App-level relock delay and FLAG_SECURE disable are now active after authentication.

entries.title: derive launcher icon visibility from component state
entries.description: Launcher icon visibility now derives from actual component enabled state, with the summary label updated to "Xposed manager".

entries.title: drop remoteProvider from AppOverridesRepository
entries.description: The hook doesn't yet read app override keys, so the remote provider is not needed.

entries.title: prevent duplicate update sheet when manual check races with auto-popup
add Logger.info/warn/error overloads and migrate all call sites
deduplicate release parsing in UpdateRepository
replace UpdateSheetState abstract titleRes with extension property
extract editBoth helper and nullable getters in AppOverridesRepository
remove dead code, fix warnings, and tighten Compose conventions
polish icon and add monochrome layer
add new icon concept
correct edge-to-edge bar style when app theme differs from system
use GitHub icon on About source row
entries.description:
Replace Icons.Outlined.Code with the ic_github_24 vector drawable.
Add a Painter overload to PreferenceRow so the ImageVector overload delegates through rememberVectorPainter.

entries.title: disable flag secure toggle until hook is wired
entries.description: Grey out the setting with DISABLED_ALPHA and drop onClick so it can't be toggled. Move the shared 0.38f constant into Tokens.DISABLED_ALPHA.

entries.title: animate bottom sheet dismiss on button tap
delay auto-popup so it appears after the UI settles
scrollbar overlapping navigation bar on app list
toggle between floating and classic navigation bar
wire commit URLs in WhatsNew entries
remove verbose logging toggle
entries.description: Debug log calls happen inside hook callbacks that fire under mGlobalLock, where reading prefs would deadlock.

entries.title: clarify relock delay labels
race condition in skip-version check and polish changelog sheet
entries.description: Read dismissed version synchronously from SharedPreferences instead of the reactive Flow to prevent the auto-popup from ignoring a skipped version on cold start. Also pins action buttons outside the scroll area, removes tap-to-collapse on descriptions, and moves commit links to long-press.

entries.title: polish update sheet transitions and interactions
entries.description: Status states morph from the loading indicator instead of snapping in, auto-popup skips the artificial delay, entries start expanded, commit links move to long-press, and Later becomes Skip this version.

entries.title: use ETag conditional requests for GitHub API calls
entries.description: 304 Not Modified responses don't count against the rate limit, so repeated update checks are essentially free.

entries.title: bundle changelog as APK asset for WhatsNew
entries.description: WhatsNew reads from a build-time bundled asset instead of fetching remotely, so it always has entries for the installed version. The remote CHANGELOG.json now keeps the last 5 releases and ChangelogSheet filters by the target version.
